prompt_text:
### Demographics: 54-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 64.5 kg; Height 175.7 cm; BMI 20.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.5%; 9 months ago 6.1%; 6 months ago 6.0%; 3 months ago 6.1%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 126mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 113mg/dL; 3 months ago 153mg/dL; current 117mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 68.7kg; 9 months ago 66.1kg; 6 months ago 64.2kg; 3 months ago 66.2kg; current 64.5kg), Height (12 months ago 175.7cm; 9 months ago 175.7cm; 6 months ago 175.7cm; 3 months ago 175.7cm; current 175.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 20.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 42U/L; 9 months ago 40U/L; 6 months ago 48U/L; 3 months ago 46U/L; current 48U/L), AST (12 months ago 96U/L; 9 months ago 93U/L; 6 months ago 95U/L; 3 months ago 84U/L; current 100U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.8mg/dL; current 1.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; current 25mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 616mg/g; 9 months ago 621mg/g; 6 months ago 449mg/g; 3 months ago 615mg/g; current 545mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 87mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 85mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 125mg/dL; 9 months ago 104mg/dL; 6 months ago 108mg/dL; 3 months ago 123mg/dL; current 115mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.56 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
